title: Data Profile
description: A structured description of the data being processed by a privacy-card-governed system. Captures sensitivity, linkage risks, jurisdiction, and data-level access control intent (including Solid Pod integration). Referenced from Privacy Cards via the data_profile_ref field.

profile_id.description: Unique identifier for this data profile.

data_categories.description: The types of personal or sensitive data present.

special_category.description: Whether this is special-category data under GDPR Art. 9 / equivalent.

linkage_risk.description: Known or assessed re-identification and linkage risk factors.

quasi_identifiers.description: Fields that individually are non-identifying but may combine to re-identify.

known_external_datasets.description: Publicly available datasets that could be used for linkage attacks.

assessment_method.description: How the re-identification risk was assessed.

auxiliary_data_risk.description: Risk from auxiliary data an attacker may hold. This field is reserved for future tooling — current rule engine does not fully evaluate this risk.

risk_present.description: Whether auxiliary data attack vectors have been identified.

known_auxiliary_sources.description: Known or plausible auxiliary datasets in the attack surface.

notes.description: Narrative on auxiliary data risk. See YAPS README for future tooling plans.

access_control.description: Who is permitted to access this data and under what conditions.

access_model.description: The access control model in use.

access_conditions.description: Conditions under which access is granted.

authorised_purposes.description: Purposes for which this data may be used.

solid_integration.description: Record of intent for Solid Pod-compatible data-level access control. This is a documentation field, not a runtime connection — YAPS does not connect to a live Solid server. See https://github.com/solid/solid and https://github.com/OXFORDIA-project/OXFORDIA-node for reference implementations.

pod_uri.description: WebID or Pod root URI for the data owner, if known.

acl_policy_ref.description: Reference to the .acl or ACP policy document governing this dataset.

webid_oidc_provider.description: WebID-OIDC identity provider for access control decisions.

oxfordia_node_ref.description: Reference to an OXFORDIA-node deployment, if applicable. See https://github.com/OXFORDIA-project/OXFORDIA-node

data_residency_intent.description: Where data will reside and under whose control, in Solid architecture terms.

integration_status.description: Whether Solid integration is implemented or intended.

notes.description: Any additional context on the Solid integration plan.
Any additional context about this data profile.
